segments.text: I think it was interesting that Chon went for an upward throw on one of the grenades
and it barely went anywhere at all.
I wonder if that's just a pot mechanic, but...

full_text: I think it was interesting that Chon went for an upward throw on one of the grenades and it barely went anywhere at all. I wonder if that's just a pot mechanic, but... Ooh!
